item.title: PSA renting from Lyft
item.description: It's now been 56ish hours and still no help from Lyft. Mind you, this is a Lyft owned rental vehicle. I've had to stay with the car this entire time because I live 50 miles away from where I'm at, which btw is a no parking zone. This spot was the only place I could make it to. If you rent from Lyft, be careful. Edit: They sent AAA just now to jump start the vehicle eventhough I informed them that you cant do that if the HEV battery pack is below a certain voltage. The AAA tech was really nice, but unsuccessful due to what I learned about this system. So now I'm back on hold with roadside "assistance". Edit: I'm 50 miles from my house, and I know Lyft will charge me for when this car gets towed by the city of Chicago. Edit: Contacted "support" again and was told "Hope you're doing ok and having a great day. Please note that you need to complete 10 rides today to keep your account active." Update: look at PSA renting from Lyft pt.2
item.dc:creator: Thanksforl

item.title: This past weekend at Tampa convention center...
item.description: If people gather together and even ONE Nazi flag is there, you have a Nazi gathering. I see 3. The blue flag says DeSantis country. “I, ___, do solemnly swear (or affirm) that I will support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic..." And here we have domestic enemies https://www.wfla.com/news/hillsborough-county/fl-holocaust-museum-nikki-fried-denounce-group-flying-nazi-flags-in-downtown-tampa/
item.dc:creator: thinkybrainpains

item.title: PSA renting from Lyft pt. 2
item.description: The continuation of part 1. Update: paid for a tow truck, got to the lyft facility, was told they don't have another rental car available. I told them all it needed was a charge to the HEV battery and it would be good to go. Instead, they told me I needed to pay $1000 and change to be able to rent again. Furthermore I have to find my own way home. I can't cash out my earnings from the Lyft app because I apparently owe them a grand. So now I'm just stuck out front of the place with no way to get the 50 miles back home. Fucking priceless. Update: Check out pt. 3
item.dc:creator: Thanksforl

item.title: Songs of the Disney Princesses, Dubbed in their Native Languages
item.description:
Moana - How Far I'll Go (Tahitian) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s02jpSqqazc
Sleeping Beauty - Once Upon a Dream (German) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NxnMTYKmzEQ
Mulan - Reflection (Mandarin Chinese) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FLoxY-qDe2Y
The Little Mermaid - Part of That World (Danish) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7ISDotDNws0
Cinderella - A Dream is a Wish Your Heart Makes (French) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_XFfpI8ZzZg
Hercules - I Won't Say I'm in Love (Greek) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j90n9A7QrJs
Frozen - Let it Go (Norwegian) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ed-UaIRJYyE
Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs - Someday My Prince WIll Come (German)
The Lion King - Can You Feel the Love Tonight? (Zulu) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wjt9pdnJ-9I
Pocahontas - Colors of the Wind (Several Indigenous American languages) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pYV8RPAyX3A
Beauty and the Beast - Belle (French)
Tangled - When Will My Life Begin (German) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DnTl-cMnxWM
Aladdin - A Whole New World (Arabic) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x6boqhcdIQI
Frozen II - Into the Unknown (Several Ural Languages) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ckXmR7Eonpc

item.title: Alzheimer's research may be completely wrong
item.description: https://www.dailykos.com/story/2022/7/22/2111914/-Two-decades-of-Alzheimer-s-research-may-be-based-on-deliberate-fraud-that-has-cost-millions-of-lives Edit: Here is the Science article the Daily Kos article is based on: https://www.science.org/content/article/potential-fabrication-research-images-threatens-key-theory-alzheimers-disease Apparently this has been questioned for at least 2 years, as here's an article from 2019 describing suppression of competitive research: https://www.statnews.com/2019/06/25/alzheimers-cabal-thwarted-progress-toward-cure/
item.dc:creator: frickadiv

item.title: Religious idiot now wants to use science
item.dc:creator: Lanhdanan

item.title: but how?
item.description: Seriously. People motivate themselves, each other, to do things, and I have almost none of it, for like, 20 years now. I can't take care of myself, I can't hold a job, I can't maintain long-lasting relationships. I have nothing and in all likelihood, due to the debilitating nature of my depression, I will always stay nothing. I can't build a life because I don't have a clue as to how to even start. I am goddamn broken and nobody seems to understand that what they're asking of me, to find it within myself, to find a reason, to see a future... I don't have it. I can't find it. It's not in there. I can't die. It'd be unfair to the people that love me. So I don't. But fuck, it's hard to figure out how to keep going. Thanks for letting me vent, Imgur. Lil Most Viral Edit: Discipline, motivation, these things people assume just take a lil elbow grease, just gotta put my mind to it? Yeah, I don't have them, can't do them, can't access the pool of energy for it, don't know where to find it. Also, please stop telling me to get a job. I would love one. I'm unqualified for most and the ones I am qualified for I can't handle. I have recently been given the advice to get myself 100% work disqualified due to psychological issues by my government. I'm telling you all this so I don't have to reply to every comment, btw. Not because I don't appreciate the support and the effort people are putting into their comments! Thank you all very much for letting me know I'm not alone and for trying to give useful advice. Second edit: Holy bejeebus. That's a lot of people. I'm a little overwhelmed. Let's answer some common questions: Alright, so, I did 14 years of therapy, I've been diagnosed with clinical depression (no medical reason found or sought for), ADD, Narcissism, Borderline Personality Disorder, DID. I've had one psychosis, three "attempts". I have been on three types of anti depressants, they don't make me function better, just more suicidal. I've been on Ritalin and it's funky cousin whose name I forgot, both made me feel like a methed up idiot. Teeth gnashing, sweating, only they also made me retain water like crazy, so that was a fun added bonus. With all that said; I am not giving up, I was never going to. I am however legit interested in these things people talk about with inner strength, motivation, discipline, the ability to remember last year, or look forward to the next one. This abstract thinking people seem to be able to do. And let me clarify, I am currently in a very loving relationship, I'm not lonely. I can empathize and understand plenty of large abstract concepts. This one friggin eludes me. Thank you, to literally everyone who commented, and much love to everyone who reached out, going through similar things. Read some of the other comments, take some useful advice from your fellow Imgurians. And remember; we're not broken, we are not alone, there is help out there. Just reach out.
item.dc:creator: wargarbel

item.title: Won't somebody please think of the billionaires?!
item.dc:creator: trippingthelightfantastic

item.title: Curb find of the day
item.description:
Saw this bad boy, thought I could sell it for a little bit. Right down the road from my storage unit, so I was just gonna run it over there.
Tight fit, but I got it in the van.
Fuck. The seat busted through the shitty particle board back. Oh well, I’ll get it out later.
Tadaa!
item.dc:creator: steeltoesandal
